calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Erin O'Donohue, Atty for Petitioner: Lydia Davis, Petitioner present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Julius Juan Zambrano, Jr., was sworn and examined. Also present was Van Lam, Social Worker.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: JULIUS JUNIOR REBOLLINI.

Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Text Ruling

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Reset To Feb-03-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611 For Order To Show Cause

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Reset To Mar-17-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-candace yount: cause called for petition and order for change of name. Erin O'Donohue appears for petitioner Lydia Davis. Lydia Davis is also present. The matter is uncontested. Ms. O'Donohue informs the court that she had paid the fee for the publication and the newspaper had cashed the check, but failed to publish the notice of petition. Ms. O'Donohue asks the Court to continue the matter so that she can make sure the matter is published. The Court continues the matter to March 17, 2005, Dept. 218, 9:00AM
